description: Create a standardized A3 landscape drawing template in LibreCAD saved as /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/a3_template.dxf. The template must include three layers: 'Border' (White), 'TitleBlock' (Cyan), and 'Text' (Green). On the 'Border' layer, draw an outer paper border rectangle from (0,0) to (420,297) and an inner margin rectangle from (10,10) to (410,287). On the 'TitleBlock' layer, create a main box rectangle from (240,10) to (410,50), a horizontal divider line from (240,30) to (410,30), and a vertical divider line from (325,10) to (325,30). On the 'Text' layer, add 5mm high annotations: 'RESIDENTIAL FLOOR PLAN' centered in the top row of the title block, 'Drawn: A. Torres' in the bottom-left cell, and 'Scale: 1:50' in the bottom-right cell.
